question: Which car models have total production larger than 100 or top speed higher than 150?
sql: SELECT Model FROM vehicle WHERE CAST(Total_Production AS NUMBER) > 100 OR Top_Speed > 150;

back_translation.intent: 查询满足特定条件的车辆模型

semantic.reason: 原始问题与SQL反向翻译描述的语义完全一致，均要求查询总产量大于100或最高时速大于150的汽车型号。
